summary: Comprehensive testing of Payroll Weekoff Fix for April 2026. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). The fix correctly differentiates active vs inactive employees: Active employees now count ALL Sundays/holidays in the month (weekoff_pay=6 for April 2026), while inactive employees stop counting at inactive_date (weekoff_pay=4 for employee with inactive_date=2026-04-14). Future working days are now counted in working_days for active employees.

features_tested.active_employee_weekoff_pay_6: PASS - Active employee April 2026: weekoff_pay=6 (4 Sundays + 2 holidays)
features_tested.active_employee_working_days_24: PASS - Active employee April 2026: working_days=24 (30 - 4 Sundays - 2 holidays)
features_tested.inactive_employee_r_status_after_inactiv: PASS - Dates after inactive_date show R status with weekoff_value=0
features_tested.inactive_employee_final_payable_formula: PASS - final_payable_days = (working_days - lop) + weekoff_pay + extra_pay - last_day_adjustment
features_tested.active_future_sundays_su_weekoff_1: PASS - Future Sundays show Su with weekoff_value=1
features_tested.active_future_working_days_na: PASS - Future working days show NA and count in working_days
features_tested.no_regression_january_2026: PASS - Active employee January 2026 unchanged (weekoff_pay=8, working_days=23)

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented in server.py lines 1719-1733: Future dates block now adds weekoff_pay and working_days for active employees
Inactive employees correctly stop at relieving_date (line 1714-1717): status = 'R', no weekoff counted
last_day_payable adjustment (line 1911-1913) correctly subtracts 1 day for inactive employees with last_day_payable=False
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test employees: TEST_NoBody_25a93648 (active), TEST_Deactivation_f98a8836 (inactive_date=2026-04-14), TEST_Relieved_05658888 (inactive_date=2026-04-16)

(3) TEST_Relieved_05658888 (id=8bc4cef5-2213-4701-9f61-d98bac1cf582) - Inactive (Apr 16), weekoff_pay=4, working_days=12. April 2026 holidays: Apr 3 (Good Friday), Apr 14 (Tamil New Year). active_employee_april_2026.formula: All Sundays + holidays in month counted

inactive_employee_apr14.formula: Only Sundays/holidays up to Apr 14 counted (Apr 3, 5, 12, 14)

inactive_employee_apr16.formula: Only Sundays/holidays up to Apr 16 counted (Apr 3, 5, 12, 14)
